coordinates.image: X left-to-right; positive world Z points upward

generation.collision_model: 16-direction, radius-3, 200 m sphere sweeps over serialized TerrainCollider geometry and packaged placed-prefab collision footprints
limitations: only colliders present during WorldSetup affect this route; later SpawnHandler populations and loaded saves do not
unpackaged or version-mismatched placed-prefab collision templates are reported in generation metadata
live cargo spawn, movement, and egress state are not part of this static export
